meaning: n.自制,克制,节欲(尤指禁欲)
examples: You can choose as per your continence.
She vowed to lead a life of continence.
But that muscle can't maintain continence on its own.
It also lists him as a member of the International Continence Society and the American Urogynaecological Association.
During much of that time, the United States enforced social norms that favored sexual continence, early marriage and low divorce rates.
